author: familiarcat
message:
feat: VSCode chat feature system review milestone

Comprehensive crew Observation Lounge assessment + Riker 4-phase execution plan.

CREW ASSESSMENT (All 11 members):
- Data: Architecture sound, dynamic assembly needs validation (Phase 2)
- Worf: Security strong, need jailbreak pattern + error sanitization (Phase 1, 5h)
- Geordi: Infrastructure production-ready, monitoring improvements (Phase 3)
- Yar: CRITICAL BLOCKER — unit tests missing for classification (Phase 1, 14h)
- Troi: UX excellent, crew variance framing needed (Phase 4)

RIKER EXECUTION PLAN: 4 phases, 50h over 2-3 weeks
Phase 1 (Week 1): Security + unit tests (BLOCKER until 2026-07-22)
Phase 2 (Week 1-2): Team assembly validation (Data, 11h)
Phase 3 (Week 2): Integration + metrics (Geordi, 14h)
Phase 4 (Week 2-3): UX polish + docs (Troi, 11h)

PICARD DECISION: GO FOR WEEK 2 CANARY with Phase 1 gate by 2026-07-22

SUCCESS CRITERIA: Test coverage ≥70%, accuracy ≥98%, latency <3s, cost ≤$0.05/user/day

CREW SIGN-OFF: All 11 members unanimous (confidence 9.2/10)

Co-Authored-By: Commander Riker (Tactical Authority) <noreply@crew.agent>
